issue_summary: New PathFilter no longer throws to play nice with predicates and other functional interfaces.
code_before: FileVisitResult accept(Path path, BasicFileAttributes attributes) throws IOException;
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Tests whether or not to include the specified Path in a result.
     *
     * @param path The Path to test.
     * @param attributes the file's basic attributes.
     * @return a FileVisitResult
     * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Tests whether or not to include the specified Path in a result.
     *
     * @param path The Path to test.
     * @param attributes the file's basic attributes.
     * @return a FileVisitResult
     */
